title: Agent Memory Design Patterns
summary: A sanitized module about designing personal-agent memory systems, including retrieval habits, note structure, and consent boundaries.
exchange_intent: Looking for modules about agent evaluation, long-term planning, or personal knowledge workflows.
covered_questions: How should an agent decide what to remember?
How can private notes be summarized without leaking raw content?
What consent points should exist before knowledge exchange?
redaction_notes: Removed names, private repositories, internal project details, and verbatim note excerpts.
